hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "(npx |node .*)remotion render"; then SESSION=$(echo "$cmd" | sed -nE "s#.*sessions/([a-z0-9-]+)/.*#\1#p" | head -1); if [ -n "$SESSION" ]; then echo "[post-render hook] running audit_render.py for session $SESSION"; cd /Users/ralphxu/Documents/Projects/spoolcast && scripts/.venv/bin/python scripts/audit_render.py --session "$SESSION" || echo "[post-render hook] AUDIT FAILED — render is NOT verified. Do not claim done until audit passes. See report in working/render-audit.json."; fi; fi'
